title: Hemmorage
lyrics: Memories are just where you laid them Drag the waters to the depths, give up their debt What did you expect to find? Was it something you left behind? Don't you remember anything I said when I said Don't fall away Leave me to myself Don't fall away Leave love bleeding in my hands In my hands again Leave love bleeding in my hands In my hands Love lies bleeding Hold me now I feel contagious Am I the only place that you left to go? She cries her life is like Some movie black and white Dead actors faking lines Over and over and over again She cries Don't fall away Leave me to myself Don't fall away Leave love bleeding In my hands In my hands again Leave love bleeding In my hands In my hands Love lies bleeding And I want it for you turned away You don't remember But I do You never even tried Never tried, yeah Never tried once for me Never ever tried Never tried to see my point of view Never see the reason why I was crying every night and you were saying I'm nothing I need my help I asked you well Love's a sober now Here it is with this blood on my hand The hemorrhage of me and you Don't fall away Leave me to myself Don't fall away Leave love bleeding In my hands In my hands again Leave love bleeding In my hands In my hands again Leave love bleeding In my hands In my hands Again Where you want it Where you got it Where you want it Where you got it www.mooji.org www.mooji.org www.mooji.org www.mooji.org www.mooji.org www.mooji.org www.mooji.org www.mooji.org
